'''wazhushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrology|iatrology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrology|iatrology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wazhushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæzhishith|wæzhishith]] || [[word:wæzhishij|wæzhishij]] || [[word:wæzhishish|wæzhishish]] || [[word:wæzhishi|wæzhishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wazhuzhushuth|wazhuzhushuth]] || [[word:wazhuzhushuj|wazhuzhushuj]] || [[word:wazhuzhushush|wazhuzhushush]] || [[word:wazhuzhushu|wazhuzhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wazhushuth|wazhushuth]] || [[word:wazhushuj|wazhushuj]] || [[word:wazhushush|wazhushush]] || [[word:wazhushu|wazhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wazhufshuth|wazhufshuth]] || [[word:wazhufshuj|wazhufshuj]] || [[word:wazhufshush|wazhufshush]] || [[word:wazhufshuf|wazhufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wazhushuthu|wazhushuthu]] || [[word:wazhushuju|wazhushuju]] || [[word:wazhushushu|wazhushushu]] || [[word:wazhushuku|wazhushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wazhushuth|wazhushuth]] || [[word:wazhushuj|wazhushuj]] || [[word:wazhushush|wazhushush]] || [[word:wazhushu|wazhushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wazhushuthul|wazhushuthul]] || [[word:wazhushujul|wazhushujul]] || [[word:wazhushushul|wazhushushul]] || [[word:wazhushukul|wazhushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wazhushuthuthu|wazhushuthuthu]] || [[word:wazhushujuju|wazhushujuju]] || [[word:wazhushushushu|wazhushushushu]] || [[word:wazhushuku|wazhushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wazhushuthun|wazhushuthun]] || [[word:wazhushujun|wazhushujun]] || [[word:wazhushushun|wazhushushun]] || [[word:wazhushukun|wazhushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wazhushuthuoro|wazhushuthuoro]] || [[word:wazhushujuoro|wazhushujuoro]] || [[word:wazhushushuoro|wazhushushuoro]] || [[word:wazhushukuoro|wazhushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
